data.title: Google Stock Falls 7% Amid Questions Over AI Leadership, Gemini 4 Roadmap
data.description: Alphabet's stock, Google, experienced a 7% drop as analysts from Wall Street raised concerns regarding the company's AI leadership, the strategic roadmap for Gemini 4, and the increasing capital expenditure following the release of the Q2 earnings report.

data.title: FCX Stock Falls Amid Soft Q3 Outlook As Copper Price Slips
data.description: FCX reduced its sales forecast for the third quarter but anticipates a significant improvement for the fourth quarter. The company's stock price dropped in response to the soft outlook for Q3 due to a decline in copper prices.

data.title: Elon Musk Preaches Patience On Robotaxi, Optimus Rollout. Tesla Stock Plummets.
data.description: During the second-quarter earnings report, Elon Musk shared some new information regarding robotaxis and Optimus. Following the updates, Tesla's stock price dropped by over 13%. Musk emphasized the importance of patience in the rollout of these technologies.

data.title: JPMorgan: Google 2027 Capital Spending Could Boom Near $400 Billion
data.description: The stock of Google experienced a decline following Alphabet's revelation of its first-ever negative free cash flow. This was attributed to the increasing expenditure on artificial intelligence as the company continues to witness significant growth in its cloud services. According to JPMorgan, Google's capital spending for the year 2027 could surge to nearly $400 billion, indicating a substantial investment in future projects and expansions.

data.title: The 'Standout Performance' That Could Save Thermo Fisher, Danaher And Others
data.description: On Thursday, Thermo Fisher stock spearheaded a recovery in the medtech sector, alleviating concerns of prolonged stagnation in medical research and tools. This standout performance signaled hope for Thermo Fisher, Danaher, and similar companies amidst market uncertainty.

data.title: IMAX Stock Crests Buy Point On Pre-'Odyssey' Earnings Surge
data.description: Before the second weekend of Nolan's blockbuster, IMAX film locations had sold out 85% of their tickets. The surge in earnings before the release of 'Odyssey' caused IMAX stock to reach a buy point, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Lockheed Martin, RTX Jump After Earnings Beat. One Is Breaking Out.
data.description: Before the market opened, Lockheed Martin and RTX saw a significant increase of over 5% in their stock prices. However, they are moving in different directions as per market trends. The latest earnings reports have led to a jump in these stocks. Lockheed Martin and RTX are experiencing contrasting trajectories with one showing signs of a breakout following the positive earnings beat.

data.title: STMicroelectronics Sinks On Soft Q3 Sales Outlook
data.description: STMicroelectronics surpassed analyst expectations for Q2 but provided a disappointing sales forecast for Q3. The company's stock value decreased following the announcement. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Westamerica Bancorporation Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in SAN RAFAEL, California, Westamerica Bancorporation (NASDAQ: WABC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.48 per share for their common stock. Shareholders recorded as of August 3, 2026, will be eligible for this dividend, which will be paid out on August 14, 2026.
